steps.title: Isolate $c$
steps.content: The equation is $$c-7=25p+k.$$ To solve for $c$, undo the subtraction by adding $7$ to both sides.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is correct. Choice B subtracts $7$ in the wrong direction. Choices C and D use multiplication or division by $7$, but the original equation subtracts $7$.
